utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Uhh , do you mind sitting there . I am ... I am saving this for my friend Ross .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Doctor ? Wow ! I did not know he had a nickname .

emotion_cause.span: 3_Doctor ? Wow ! I did not know he had a nickname .

utterances.speaker: Tour Guide
utterances.text: Oh , he will not sit here .

utterances.speaker: Tour Guide
utterances.text: Only the people in the white coats sit over there , and only the people in the blue blazers sit here .
